listings.title: Roland Drum Pads PDX-6 and PDX-8
listings.body: Roland Drum Pads PDX-6 (3 available) and PDX-8 (1 available) all used but in good condition.  I'd like to sell the whole set, but I will part out in groups of 2 or more.  PDX-8 is $60, PDX-6 are $50 each.  Take them all for $190.  I do have some mounting brackets available at extra cost, but not enough for all these pads.  Local pickup in Mahopac area only, no shipping.

listings.title: LG Tromm Dryer
listings.body: LG Troom dryer. Good condition, nothing broken. Gas dryer. Contact at show contact info
